settings.subtext: At PawCo, our mission goes far beyond products. We're building a movement — one wagging tail at a time — toward a healthier, more compassionate world for every pet.

settings.heading: Three Pillars of Our Promise
settings.subtext: Everything we do is guided by our deep belief that pets deserve the very best — and so does the planet they share with us.

settings.title: Planet-First Sustainability
settings.description: We design every product and package with the Earth in mind. From biodegradable materials to carbon-neutral shipping.

settings.title: Vet-Approved Excellence
settings.description: Every formula, ingredient, and product we create is developed with and approved by licensed veterinarians.

settings.title: The PawCo Foundation
settings.description: Our in-house charitable foundation partners with shelters and rescue groups to find forever homes for animals.

settings.heading: Shrinking Our Paw Print
settings.subtext: We believe that loving pets and loving the planet go hand in hand. That's why sustainability is a core design principle.

settings.title: Zero-waste packaging
settings.description: Fully compostable boxes — no plastic, no glue, no guilt.

settings.title: Carbon-neutral shipping
settings.description: Every order offset via certified tree-planting partnerships.

settings.title: Responsibly sourced
settings.description: Traceable supply chains with zero harmful additives.

settings.heading: We Don't Just Care — We Act
settings.subtext: Charitable giving is woven into the fabric of who we are. Our team volunteers, donates, and organizes because they genuinely care.
settings.label_subtext: Since launching the PawCo Foundation in 2021

settings.title: Shelter Partnerships
settings.description: We've partnered with 80+ local and national shelters donating products and funding.

settings.title: Monthly Volunteer Days
settings.description: Our entire team closes the office once a month to spend the day at local shelters.

settings.title: Adoption Events & Drives
settings.description: From pop-up adoption fairs to donation drives, we host community events.

settings.heading: Only the Best Makes It to Your Pet's Bowl
settings.subtext: We hold ourselves to the highest possible standards — because best friends deserve the absolute best.

settings.title: Expert-formulated from day one
settings.description: Every product begins with our team of accredited pet nutritionists.

settings.title: Rigorous safety testing
settings.description: Our production facilities welcome routine third-party inspections.

settings.title: Transparent ingredients
settings.description: No vague "natural flavors" or mystery fillers — every ingredient is listed.

settings.heading: Shop with Purpose. Love with Purpose.
settings.subtext: When you choose PawCo, you're not just buying a product — you're backing a mission to make the world a kinder place.
